ent.description: Ent feature flags applied during code generation.

features.description: Ent feature flags enabled for the project.

paths.description: Path configuration for generated project files and directories.

buf_gen_file.description: Legacy path field retained for backward compatibility.

build_output.description: Build output path for the compiled application binary.

composite_dir.description: Directory containing composite schema dumps for Atlas diffs.

config_example.description: Example config file path committed to the repository.

dev_compose.description: Docker Compose file used by hatch env commands.

ent_dir.description: Directory where generated Ent code is written.

main_package.description: Main server package used by build and dev commands.

rpc_dir.description: Legacy proto output directory field. Prefer [proto].out_dir in new files.

schema_dir.description: Directory containing Ent schema source files.

proto.description: Proto source configuration used by hatch gen rpc.

dir.description: Directory containing local proto source files.

enabled.description: Whether RPC generation is enabled for the project.

git_branch.description: Git branch used when proto.source is git.

git_repo.description: Git repository URL used when proto.source is git.

local_override_dir.description: Optional local directory that overrides a git-based proto source on the current machine.

out_dir.description: Directory where generated RPC code is written.

run.description: Default command arguments used by hatch start and hatch dev.

command.description: Command and arguments passed to the generated server binary.

description: Schema for hatch.toml and hatch.local.toml files consumed by the hatch CLI.

app_name.description: Human-friendly application name shown in generated docs and CLI output.

binary_name.description: Binary name used for build output and generated scripts.

go_version.description: Go toolchain version used by generated projects.

hatch_module_path.description: Module path for the hatch framework dependency.

hatch_replace_path.description: Optional local replace path used during hatch development.

hatch_version.description: Version selector for the hatch framework dependency in generated go.mod files.

module_path.description: Go module path for the application, for example example.com/acme/demo.

proto_enabled.description: Legacy top-level proto enable flag. Prefer [proto].enabled in new files.

title: Hatch Project Metadata
